case_title: BAY HAUL OF FAME LLC VS. MONICA LANDRY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALLEN BIAS, OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY HAUL OF FAME LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $84.97) SERVED JUN-21-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LANDRY, MONICA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY HAUL OF FAME LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDRY, MONICA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,134.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BAY HAUL OF FAME LLC, REPRESENTED BY ALLEN BAIS, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONICA LANDRY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT VOIR DIRES PARTIES RE: PROPER VENUE. COURT DETERMINES THAT SAN FRANCISCO IS PROPER VENUE AND THE MOVES FORWARD WITH TRIAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2022 - JUDGMENT. MATTER PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 7-19-22.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAY HAUL OF FAME LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LANDRY, MONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
